TestCaseTitle: ERP creation wizard visits all 7 sub-steps in order
TestSteps: 1) Walk through the wizard without skipping.
ExpectedResult: Steps advance in order: Modules → Questionnaire → Generate → Review → Edit → Preview → Download. Back button returns to the previous step.

TestCaseTitle: Generated ERP's language matches the project's language field
TestSteps: 1) Complete the full pipeline. 2) Open the generated ERP preview.
ExpectedResult: The preview UI copy is in Turkish regardless of what the user has chosen as their CURRENT UI language at preview time.

TestCaseTitle: All three modules (Inventory, Invoice, HR) are offered as checkboxes
ExpectedResult: Three checkboxes are visible. None is required at the field level; the step is advanced only when ≥1 module is picked.

TestCaseTitle: Array input filters out unsupported module names
ExpectedResult: Returns ['inventory','hr']. Unsupported keys are silently dropped.

TestCaseTitle: Comma-separated string input is split and normalized (case-insensitive + trim)
ExpectedResult: Returns ['inventory','invoice','hr'].

TestCaseTitle: Duplicate modules are collapsed while preserving first-seen order
ExpectedResult: Returns ['hr','inventory','invoice'].

TestCaseTitle: null, undefined, a number, or an object all yield []
TestSteps: 1) Call with each of null, undefined, 42, { hr: true }.
ExpectedResult: All four calls return [].

TestCaseTitle: Question prompts render in Turkish when project.language = 'tr'
ExpectedResult: Each prompt displays the TR-localized template.prompt from the registry (not the row's cached question text from a prior language).

TestCaseTitle: "Continue" stays disabled until all required visible questions are answered
TestSteps: 1) Leave one required question blank. 2) Try to click Continue.
ExpectedResult: Button is disabled OR a 400 error with missing_required_question_ids is shown if forced.

TestCaseTitle: Rule { rules:[{question_key,equals}], op:'all' } requires EVERY rule to match
TestSteps: 1) Use an unexported helper via proxy, or assert behavior through getQuestionnaireState visibility.
ExpectedResult: Questions with a two-rule condition are visible: false when only one rule matches and visible: true when both match.

TestCaseTitle: op: 'any' makes the question visible when ANY rule matches
TestSteps: 1) Seed a question whose condition has op: 'any' and rule A=X, B=Y; answer B=Y only.
ExpectedResult: Question becomes visible.

TestCaseTitle: multi_choice answers are serialized as JSON arrays before being persisted
TestSteps: 1) Call saveQuestionnaireAnswers with answer: ['A','B'] on a multi_choice question.
ExpectedResult: The answerText passed to Answer.createMany is '["A","B"]' — a JSON-encoded array.

TestCaseTitle: Boolean true/false answers are serialized as the strings 'yes'/'no'
TestSteps: 1) Save a single_choice question with answer: true. 2) Save another with answer: false.
ExpectedResult: The stored answerTexts are 'yes' and 'no' respectively.

TestCaseTitle: completion.is_complete is true only when every visible required question has a non-empty answer
ExpectedResult: completion.is_complete === false; missing_required_question_ids contains the 1 un-answered ID.

TestCaseTitle: Empty / whitespace answers count as unanswered regardless of the question type
ExpectedResult: That question's answered is false; it shows up in missing_required_question_ids.

TestCaseTitle: Clicking "Generate" shows progress UI and then the SDF summary
ExpectedResult: A spinner / progress indicator is visible; the request may take up to 5 min; on success the summary page appears.

TestCaseTitle: Clicking Generate with description shorter than 10 chars shows an error
ExpectedResult: Inline error: backend returned description is required.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when description is missing or < 10 characters
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'description is required' }. AI gateway is NOT called.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 with missing_required_question_ids when the questionnaire is incomplete
TestSteps: 1) Call analyzeProject with a valid description.
ExpectedResult: res.status(400); body contains error: 'Mandatory module questions are incomplete' and the missing IDs/keys. The AI gateway is NOT called.

TestCaseTitle: Passes project.language through to the AI gateway
ExpectedResult: aiGatewayClient.analyzeDescription is called with options.language === 'tr'.

TestCaseTitle: Sets project status to 'Clarifying' when AI returns unanswered clarification questions, else 'Ready'
Preconditions: AI returns clarifications_needed: [{...}] on run 1; [] on run 2
ExpectedResult: After run 1 final updateProject call has status: 'Clarifying'. After run 2 (no questions) it's status: 'Ready'.

TestCaseTitle: Unsupported features returned by the AI are forwarded to the feature-request service (fire-and-forget)
ExpectedResult: featureRequestService.recordFeatures is called with source: 'sdf_generation'. A rejection from that call does NOT fail the request.

TestCaseTitle: Controller surfaces AI 503 back-pressure errors as HTTP 503, not 500
Preconditions: aiGatewayClient.analyzeDescription rejects with Object.assign(new Error('busy'), { statusCode: 503 })
ExpectedResult: res.status(503); body { error: 'busy' }.

TestCaseTitle: Review page shows entity count, field count, relation count, and module list
ExpectedResult: All four numbers are rendered. Each entity can be expanded to show its fields.

TestCaseTitle: Clicking "Developer details" toggles the raw JSON viewer
ExpectedResult: The raw JSON of the SDF is shown in a code block. Clicking again hides it.

TestCaseTitle: Handles a null / non-object SDF with a single warning and zeroed counts
ExpectedResult: Both return { entityCount: 0, fieldCount: 0, relationCount: 0, moduleSummaries: [], entities: [], warnings: ['SDF is empty or not an object.'] }.

TestCaseTitle: Counts entities and (sum of) fields and relation fields accurately
TestSteps: 1) Call with an SDF that has 2 entities, 5+3 fields, 1+2 relation fields.
ExpectedResult: entityCount: 2, fieldCount: 8, relationCount: 3. Each entity summary has its own fieldCount and relationFields.

TestCaseTitle: Emits a warning for any entity field whose reference.entity does not resolve to a known slug
Preconditions: Entity A has a relation field pointing to slug 'ghost' which is not defined
ExpectedResult: warnings contains a message referencing entity A and the missing slug 'ghost'.

TestCaseTitle: Emits a warning for any entity with an empty fields array
ExpectedResult: warnings contains 'Entity "A" has no fields.'.

TestCaseTitle: Appends a warning when the SDF still contains pending clarification questions
ExpectedResult: A warning mentions exactly '2 clarification(s) are still pending.'.

TestCaseTitle: Saving invalid JSON via the editor shows an inline error without overwriting the stored SDF
TestSteps: 1) Edit JSON, introduce a syntax error, click Save.
ExpectedResult: Inline parse error shown, no network request, stored SDF unchanged.

TestCaseTitle: AI-edit text box requires at least some text before enabling the submit button
ExpectedResult: Submit button disabled.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when the payload is missing project_name
TestSteps: 1) Call saveSdf with { sdf: { entities: [{...}] } } (no project_name).
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'SDF.project_name is required' }. SDF.create NOT called.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when entities is empty or not an array
TestSteps: 1) Call with { sdf: { project_name:'X', entities:[] } }. 2) Call with entities: 'not-array'.
ExpectedResult: Both calls return res.status(400) with matching error messages.

TestCaseTitle: On success, persists a new SDF row and transitions project status to 'Ready' when there are no clarifications
Preconditions: Valid SDF; SDF.create resolves; no clarifications_needed
ExpectedResult: SDF.create invoked once. Final updateProject call carries status: 'Ready'. Response body includes sdf_version.

TestCaseTitle: Transitions project status to 'Clarifying' when the saved SDF still has clarifications_needed
ExpectedResult: Final updateProject call carries status: 'Clarifying'.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when instructions are missing or empty
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'instructions is required' }. AI gateway not called.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when no current SDF exists (DB empty + body without current_sdf)
Preconditions: SDF.findLatestByProject resolves null; body lacks current_sdf
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'No current SDF found for this project' }. AI gateway not called.

TestCaseTitle: Preview page embeds the generated ERP in an iframe
ExpectedResult: The generated ERP is embedded; it is a separate system (CustomERP platform UI is hidden).

TestCaseTitle: Change-request text box forwards input to the regenerate endpoint
TestSteps: 1) Type 3+ characters into the "Change" field. 2) Click "Apply".
ExpectedResult: A POST is sent to /api/projects/:id/regenerate carrying change_instructions.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when change_instructions are missing or shorter than 3 chars
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with the "min 3 chars" message. AI gateway NOT invoked.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when no existing SDF is found
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with the "Generate one first" message.

TestCaseTitle: Platform dropdown shows Windows / macOS arm64 / macOS x64 / Linux / Docker ZIP
ExpectedResult: Five options, auto-selected entry matches the detected OS.

TestCaseTitle: Clicking Download starts a ZIP download
ExpectedResult: Browser saves a .zip file with a safe filename.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when platform query string is missing
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with body containing supported: ['macos-arm64','macos-x64','linux-x64','windows-x64'].

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when the project has no SDF yet
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'No SDF found. Analyze and save an SDF first.' }.

TestCaseTitle: Returns 400 when the latest SDF fails the generator validator
ExpectedResult: res.status(400) with { error: 'Latest SDF is invalid: SDF.project_name is required' }.

TestCaseTitle: Updates project status to 'Generated' before streaming the zip
ExpectedResult: projectService.updateProject is called with { status: 'Generated' } BEFORE streamZipFromDir.

TestCaseTitle: Cleans up the generated temp directory in finally
ExpectedResult: rmDirRecursive is called exactly once with the directory returned by generateProjectDir.

TestCaseTitle: Rejects path traversal and produces a safe zip filename
ExpectedResult: The Content-Disposition header has filename="etc-passwd.zip" — no slashes, no dots other than the extension.

TestCaseTitle: Turkish / Unicode characters collapse to hyphens but a baseline filename is always produced
ExpectedResult: Filename becomes something like filename="irket-Projesi.zip" or filename="custom-erp.zip" — never empty, never raw Turkish characters.
